Your free companion for daily worship \u: Your free companion for daily worship — checklist, prayer times, Quran, fasting, and more.
Daily Checklist Desc: Stay on track with your daily adhkar, salah, and routines — auto-generated from your recurring habits.
Prayer Times Desc: Accurate prayer times for your location with reminders before each salah.
Quran Tracking Desc: Log daily Quran reading, set Khatm goals, and track your Hifz with spaced repetition.
Fasting Log Desc: Track Ramadan, sunnah fasts, and make up missed days with full history.
Goals & Progress Desc: Set daily, monthly, and yearly spiritual goals with beautiful progress rings.
Circles Desc: Share streaks with friends and family in private circles. Grow together in worship.

Landing.HeroH1: A free companion for your daily worship
Landing.HeroSub: Your virtual Muslim self — daily checklist, prayer times, Quran tracking, fasting, goals. No ads. No trackers. No data selling.
Landing.HeroTrust: ✓ No credit card · ✓ Open source (AGPL-3.0) · ✓ 2-minute setup
Landing.ValueFreeBody: No paywalls. No premium tiers. No 'Pro' upsell. 100% of features free, forever.
Landing.ValueOpenBody: Every line of code is public. Audit it, self-host it, contribute to it.
Landing.ValuePrivateBody: No analytics, no ads, no third-party trackers. Your worship data stays on your server.
Landing.FeaturesTitle: Everything you need for your daily worship
Landing.FeaturesSub: One app for all your Islamic routines. Free, private, and open source.
Landing.AppPreviewSub: A glance at your dashboard and the mobile view — prayer times, daily checklist, and progress rings.
Landing.HowItWorksSub: Three simple steps to your daily companion
Landing.Step1Body: Free, takes 30 seconds. Email and password — that's it.
Landing.Step2Body: Auto-detected or manual. Choose your madhab for Asr and your high-latitude rule.
Landing.Step3Body: Pick from templates or create your own. Your Today checklist generates itself.
Landing.MissionBody: We built DeenMate as sadaqah jariyah — a gift to the ummah. No venture capital, no exit, no shareholders. Hosting is funded by your donations. The code is yours to keep, audit, or self-host. Free in this life, insha'Allah reward in the next.
Landing.MissionHadithTranslation: The best of you are those who learn the Quran and teach it.
Landing.TestimonialsNote: Sample testimonials — real user quotes coming soon.
Landing.Testimonial1Quote: The privacy-first design is what made me trust it. I self-host for my whole family now.
Landing.Testimonial2Quote: Finally a worship app that doesn't nag me with subscriptions. The Hijri offset option is a thoughtful touch.
Landing.Testimonial3Quote: Circles let me and my friends keep each other accountable without sharing every detail of my day.
Landing.DonationBody: Hosting, domains, and development cost real money. If DeenMate helps your worship, consider a small donation — even $3/month makes a difference.
Landing.FooterTagline: Made with sincerity for the ummah 🕌
Privacy.PrivacyUpdated: Last updated: today. DeenMate is donation-funded, open source, and your data is yours.
Privacy.SectionPledgeBody: We do not and will never show ads, sell your data, or use third-party trackers. We do not have analytics enabled by default. The only people who can read your worship data are you and the people you explicitly share with (Circles).
Privacy.SectionDataBody: Your account stores only what you enter: prayer logs, routines, goals, Quran progress, fasting days, todos, and Circles you join. Location is stored as approximate coordinates (geohash 6) plus the lat/lng you provide for prayer-time calculation — never used to identify you.
Privacy.SectionDataItem1: Prayer logs and routines stay on the DeenMate server (or your own, if you self-host).
Privacy.SectionDataItem2: Location: approximate coordinates only, used to compute prayer times. You can clear this at any time in Settings.
Privacy.SectionDataItem3: Donation records (amount, provider, external id) are kept for bookkeeping and tax purposes. No card details ever touch our database.
Privacy.SectionAnalyticsBody: By default, no analytics runs. The codebase supports self-hosted Plausible analytics, but it is disabled by default and may be enabled on the hosted instance via configuration. We will never use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or any third-party tracking service.
Privacy.SectionRightsBody: You can export all of your data at any time (Settings → Privacy → Export data). You can delete your account and all associated data permanently from the same page. Deletion is irreversible.
Privacy.SectionContactBody: Questions, concerns, or a privacy report? Email us at
Terms.TermsUpdated: Last updated: today. By using DeenMate you agree to these terms.
Terms.SectionServiceBody: DeenMate is a free, donation-funded web application. All features are provided as-is. We may add or remove features over time; we will not silently delete your data without notice.
Terms.SectionAccountBody: You are responsible for your password and for activity on your account. Use a strong password. Do not share your account.
Terms.SectionDonationsBody: Donations are voluntary and non-refundable except where required by the donation platform. They fund hosting, content, and translations. Donations do not unlock any features — all features are free for all users.
Terms.SectionLicenseBody: The DeenMate source code is licensed under the
Terms.SectionNoWarrantyBody: DeenMate is provided without warranty of any kind. We are not liable for decisions made based on prayer-time calculations, Hijri dates, Zakat estimates, or any other computation. For religious rulings, consult a qualified scholar.
